title: RUBY!
description: Swapping emerals for rubies. (ex. blocks or ore slots, up to when trading with villagers)
body:
**🚀 ITITAN Hosting - Premium, Reliable & Budget-Friendly Minecraft Servers - from just €2.50/month**

# Bored with the usual texture of emeralds?

## Or want to go back to an older ruby texture?

_After all, this TexturePack is for you! This can make the game more enjoyable. This changes, ex. the texture of the block, ore, slot when trading with villagers, etc. ! I hope you will be happy using these textures! They work for any version of Minecraft. That's all you need to know about this texturepack!_

**Enjoy!**
